name: arbiter-forge
description: Forge, validate, and persist runnable multimodel implementation, documentation, and blind-check task bundles.

interface.shortDescription: Build and save runnable multimodel arbiter tasks.
interface.longDescription: Arbiter Forge turns a normalized objective into a deterministic, self-contained orchestration prompt with role-oriented model/provider fallbacks, validates its provenance, and can persist it as an ignored repository-local task bundle with exact launch commands.
defaultPrompt: Use Arbiter Forge to produce, validate, and materialize the smallest sufficient hard-arbiter task for my objective, then give me its artifact links and launch commands.
